output_modifiers.label: Frail elderly follow-up modifier
output_modifiers.note: Shorten follow-up to 48 to 72 hours and confirm explicit return instructions.

output_modifiers.label: Diabetes follow-up modifier
output_modifiers.note: Confirm clinician-entered follow-up and return instructions because infection recovery may be less predictable.

output_modifiers.label: Diabetes wound-healing modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag higher infection/dehiscence risk and confirm clinician-entered follow-up.

output_modifiers.label: Peripheral vascular disease wound-healing modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag slower healing risk and confirm clinician-entered follow-up.

output_modifiers.label: Anticoagulation bleeding modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag bleeding risk while preserving the simple-wound pathway.

output_modifiers.label: Delayed clean-wound presentation modifier
output_modifiers.note: For clean delayed wounds, confirm clinician-entered follow-up; contaminated or bite wounds remain blocked separately.
